description: Operate WSJT-X (FT8/FT4/WSPR) from MCP clients over its UDP message protocol.
name: io.github.sbrunner-atx/wsjtx-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Operator callsign — the single transmit gate. Blank = receive-only (refuses all transmit-initiating messages).
environmentVariables.name: WSJTX_CALLSIGN

environmentVariables.description: Address to bind/receive WSJT-X UDP broadcasts on. Use 127.0.0.1 (and the udp_relay) for a remote WSJT-X.
environmentVariables.name: WSJTX_HOST

environmentVariables.description: WSJT-X Settings → Reporting → UDP Server port. Default 2237. Enable 'Accept UDP requests' for control.
environmentVariables.name: WSJTX_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Optional multicast group to join so multiple UDP consumers can coexist. Blank = unicast.
environmentVariables.name: WSJTX_MULTICAST

environmentVariables.description: Optional WSJT-X instance Id to target when several broadcast here.
environmentVariables.name: WSJTX_INSTANCE
